note: Operator runs a deployed system; deployment-side obligations map to deployer (PN has no operator role).
Supply-chain actor that makes an AI system available; maps to provider.
Infrastructure supply; nearest PN role is provider (PN has no compute_provider).
Privacy controller determines purpose/means and uses the system in a context; deployment-side.
Processes on behalf of and under instruction of a controller = a service provider.
Covered entity with deployment-context obligations; PN has no data_broker role.
Enforcer/oversight body, not a regulated actor. No PN role emitted (null) so an enforcer never displays as a regulated party.
Protected rights-holder, not a duty-bearer. No PN role emitted (null).
Generic covered-entity catch-all; deployer is the modal regulated role. PN may refine on its side.
